# IResonanceState.Installed property

The equipped Imagine resonance ids, in slot order (`[0]` = left / X, `[1]` = right / Z). Empty until a container sync has populated it. Each id resolves to display + cooldown data via [`IGameDataResonance`](../IGameDataResonance.md).

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<int> Installed { get; }
```
